title: Automatic Soldering Iron Station
description: Temperature-controlled soldering station for a Hakko-style or generic 24 V DC heating-element iron. A PT100 RTD in the iron tip feeds a MAX31865 SPI amplifier; a PID loop drives an SSR switching the 24 V heater supply; rotary encoder and OLED give setpoint control and live temperature readout.
objective: Regulate tip temperature within ±3 °C of setpoint (150–480 °C); reach setpoint from cold in < 45 s; auto-sleep after 5 min idle (iron in stand); tip-temperature displayed in °C.
constraints: 24 V DC 60 W supply for heater; 5 V USB for logic; PT100 in iron handle; SSR for 24 V DC switching; ≤ £25 BOM.
supporting_fact_titles: Rotary Encoder — Incremental A/B Quadrature Pulse Counting
OLED SSD1306 Monochrome Display I²C Interface

element_usage_notes.MAX31865 PT100 RTD Amplifier: 2-wire PT100 in iron handle; SPI on D10–D13; polled at 10 Hz; thermal mass compensation: derivative term K_d reduced to prevent overshoot at heat-up.
element_usage_notes.N-Channel MOSFET Low-Side Load Switch: IRLZ44N switches 24 V heater element return path (max 2.5 A); PWM at 10 Hz from D5 matches SSR zero-cross rate; gate via 100 Ω resistor from Nano D5.
element_usage_notes.Rotary Encoder User-Interface Navigation: KY-040; CLK D2 INT0, DT D4, SW D3; 5 °C per detent (hold for 1 °C fine); press to toggle sleep mode.
element_usage_notes.SSD1306 OLED Display UI Module: 128×64; shows setpoint vs actual, HEATING/AT TEMP/SLEEP status, PID bar graph; 2 Hz refresh.
element_usage_notes.Arduino Uno/Nano MCU Platform: Nano 3.0; SPI MAX31865 CS=D10; I²C OLED A4/A5; MOSFET PWM D5; reed switch stand sensor D6 (auto-sleep).

element_interactions.description: 10-Hz read; 3-sample median filter removes spike noise from heater EMI. Temperature process variable fed to PID loop.

element_interactions.data: direction delta (±1 per detent) + press event via INT
element_interactions.description: CW = setpoint +5 °C; CCW = setpoint −5 °C; range 150–480 °C. Short press: sleep on/off. Setpoint saved to EEPROM on change.

element_interactions.data: PWM duty cycle (0–100 %) on GPIO D5 at 10 Hz
element_interactions.description: PID output (0–100) mapped to 100 ms window: output=70 → 70 ms HIGH per 100 ms window. MOSFET switches 24 V heater element current.
Status: HEATING if temp < setpoint − 10 °C; AT TEMP if within ±3 °C; SLEEP if idle > 5 min. PID bar graph shows heat duty.
